title: 动图视频模式
sourceRevision: unknown; inventory snapshot is frozen by source hashes
completionRule: Complete only when the reviewed AST prototype and the legacy 1920x1080 characterization cover the resident Card shell, icon, toggle, keyword parsing, FFmpeg states, retry/error state, canonical media persistence, animated-image keyword contract, active-image stability and bounded lazy delivery.

unsupportedNodes.replacement: React state for draft input plus the shared browser-safe media DTO; no second source of truth
Optional host probe. Until the runtime exposes a capability, the Card shows '未提供 FFmpeg 探测' rather than fabricating availability
Radix Switch, shared media DTO and browser-safe @xiranite/node-neoview/animated-video export

sourceUiInventory.title: 常驻 Card 外壳与图标
acceptanceItems: Card id animatedVideoMode、标题动图视频模式、默认 control Panel
未打开书籍时仍渲染完整 Card 外壳和控件
使用 Video 图标语义并保持独立 lazy chunk
共享折叠、隐藏、停靠、窗口和高度行为不由 Card 重写

sourceUiInventory.title: 动图视频模式开关
acceptanceItems: 默认关闭且 checked 语义保持一致
点击开关更新 enabled 并持久化到共享 media 配置
启用后显示 GIF/APNG/动画 WebP 与关键词命中说明
开关在无书和已打开书籍时均可操作

sourceUiInventory.title: 关键词直判输入
acceptanceItems: textarea 默认显示 [#dyna]
逗号和换行分隔、去空白、转小写并去重
空列表回退 [#dyna]
输入变化只更新 media keywords，不触发图片重取

sourceUiInventory.title: FFmpeg 探测状态与重试
acceptanceItems: 未检测、检测中、可用和不可用状态有独立标签
重试按钮在探测中禁用并在完成后恢复
未提供宿主探测时显示诚实错误，不伪造可用状态
探测失败不卸载 Card 其他设置控件

sourceUiInventory.title: 共享配置、生命周期与媒体稳定性
acceptanceItems: GUI 使用 ReaderMediaConfigDto/patch，不写 localStorage 或 Reader 业务表
关键词匹配只消费规范化文本并保持大小写不敏感
无书时可编辑，打开书籍后配置仍保留
切换开关、关键词和探测不会改变当前媒体节点或 asset URL

notes: The React Card is resident and uses the shared media configuration path. FFmpeg probing remains deliberately partial until the runtime exposes the canonical host capability; the scripted browser evidence covers the no-probe state and stable image identity. CLI/TUI have no legacy Card surface and remain not-applicable.
